shortForecast: Patchy Fog then Showers And Thunderstorms
name: Today
detailedForecast: Patchy fog and a slight chance of rain showers before 10am, then a chance of rain showers and patchy fog between 10am and noon, then showers and thunderstorms. Cloudy, with a high near 60. Southwest wind 9 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.
